title: EXTRASTAR Black Outdoor Wall Lights PIR Motion Sensor, GU10 Base Double Up Down Exterior Wall Sconce, IP44 Stainless Steel Wall Light for Garden, Patio,Porch, Garage（Bulb not Included）
features: 【GU10 Base】: This wall lamp uses GU10 standard lamp base, whether you have LED bulbs or other bulbs, you can install them as you like. The wall light requires 2× GU10 bulbs. (Please note: Our products do not have light bulbs. When configuring GU10 light bulbs, the equivalent wattage of a single light bulb cannot exceed 35W, and the rated voltage is 220-240V~)

【Premium Quality＆PIR Motion Sensor】: High-tech painting process design makes the wall light look modern and simple. The body of the wall light is supported by die-cast aluminum, which is strong and stable with perfect quality. 100° human body sensing angle and 2-6 meters human body sensing distance.

【IP44 Waterproof】: IP44 can use our wall light outdoors with a specific waterproof rating. But please note that IP44 does not mean that the product can be soaked or exposed to rain for a long time, which will affect the product's life. In order to ensure the life of the product, if it rains for a long time, it is best to cover it with a cloth to cover it.

【Wide Application】: The modern design of the outer lamp glowing up and down makes the wall lamp atmospheric and simple, beautiful, and comfortable. Perfect for patios, gardens, porches, doorways, garages, and more.
【After-sales Service】: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us anytime; we will try our best to solve your problems.
description: Product Description Product Specifications Applicable Bulb Type 2 x GU10 （Bulbs not included）Max 35w Applicable Voltage 220-240V~ Waterproof Level IP44 Applicable Scene Patios, Gardens, Porches, Doorways, and more Base Type This wall lamp is equipped with GU10 standard base screw, you can use all kinds of GU10 bulbs. Whether you have LED bulbs or other bulbs, you can install them as you like. IP44 Waterproof IP44 can make our wall light be used outdoors with a certain waterproof rating. But please note that IP44 does not mean that the product can be soaked or exposed to rain for a long time, which will affect the product's life. Classical Atmosphere The wall lamp with a retro design is classical, elegant, beautiful, and atmospheric.
